title: 4 Transportation Stocks Poised for an Earnings Beat in Q4
text: Escalating fuel costs are likely to have partly hurt the fourth-quarter 2021 performances of Expeditors (EXPD), Norfolk Southern (NSC), Landstar (LSTR) and Gol Linhas (GOL).

title: 3 Transportation Stocks to Buy Before Q4 Earnings Release
text: On the back of multiple tailwinds, we believe, stocks like Expeditors (EXPD), Copa Holdings (CPA) and ArcBest Corporation (ARCB) should grace the portfolios of investors.

title: Why Expeditors International (EXPD) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Expeditors International (EXPD) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Barclays Updates Price Target For Several Transportation Companies
text: Barclays analyst Brandon Oglenski updated the price targets for several transportation companies. The analyst mentions that the pricing remains key as the supply-driven volume recovery likely pushed out for the North American transportation sector.

title: 3 Transportation Stocks With Dividend Growth to Bet on
text: To combat the prevalent uncertainty, investing in dividend-paying transportation stocks like Expeditors (EXPD), UPS and FedEx (FDX) seems prudent.

title: Dividend Growth Stock Watchlist - January 2022
text: There are 23 stocks on my dividend growth watchlist for January 2022. Six of the stocks on my watchlist are currently undervalued based on dividend yield theory.
